label: Commodity Carry
description: Rank 5 commodities (gold, oil, corn, wheat, soybeans) by carry proxy (1m return − 3m return/3 ≈ roll-yield differential), long top 3, monthly. Futures-price proxies from commodities_daily.csv (ETF downloads blocked; true spot/futures spread pending).
reference: Koijen, Moskowitz, Pedersen & Vrugt (2018), 'Carry' — commodity leg
